title: Hire a home care worker (caregiver) - Canada.ca
content:
## Hire a home care worker (caregiver)
There are a few ways you can hire a home care worker (caregiver). Your options depend on
- whether you’re inside or outside Quebec
- where the home care worker (caregiver) will work
The information on this page applies to employers looking to hire a
- home child care provider ( National Occupation Classification 44100 )
- home support worker ( National Occupation Classification 44101 )
If you need to hire a worker in another occupation , follow the process to hire a foreign worker .
- Hire a worker who’s in Canada
- Hire a worker who’s outside Canada
- Hire a worker as an employer in Quebec

## Hire a worker who’s in Canada
If you’re an employer (outside Quebec), you can hire a home care worker through one of the programs below.

### Home Care Worker Immigration Pilots: Workers in Canada stream : Option 1 of 4
The Home Care Worker Immigration pilots : Workers in Canada stream allows Canadian employers (outside Quebec) to hire qualified home care workers already in Canada.
How to hire under this pilot

### Home Child Care Provider and Home Support Worker pilots : Option 2 of 4
Closed to new applicants on June 17, 2024
You can only hire workers through these pilots if either
- the worker already has an open work permit without restrictions that would prevent them from working in child care or health services
- the worker already has a work permit under one of the pilots

### Temporary Foreign Worker Program : Option 3 of 4
You can only hire workers through this program if they meet these 2 conditions:
- the worker either already has a work or study permit is allowed to work in Canada without a work permit (this doesn’t apply to business visitors ) will work in Quebec
- already has a work or study permit
- is allowed to work in Canada without a work permit (this doesn’t apply to business visitors )
- you can get a positive Labour Market Impact Assessment (LMIA) and have your candidate apply for a new LMIA-based work permit
Hire through the Temporary Foreign Worker

### International Mobility Program (open work permits other than the pilots) : Option 4 of 4
You can only hire workers under this program if
- the worker already has an open work permit without restrictions that would prevent them from working in child care or health services

## Hire a worker who’s outside Canada
If you’re an employer (outside Quebec), you can hire a home care worker through one of the programs below.

### Home Care Worker Immigration Pilots: Applicants not working in Canada stream : Option 1 of 4
How to hire under this pilot (once it opens)

### Home Child Care Provider and Home Support Worker pilots : Option 2 of 4
Closed to new applicants on June 17, 2024
You can only hire workers through these pilots if either
- you already submitted a job offer to a worker, and they submitted their permanent residence application before the program closed
- the worker already has an open work permit without restrictions that would prevent them from working in child care or health services

### Temporary Foreign Worker Program : Option 3 of 4
You can only hire through this program if the worker will work in Quebec.
Hire through the Temporary Foreign Worker Program .

## Hire a worker as an employer in Quebec
If you’re an employer in Quebec, you can hire a home care worker who’s outside or in Canada through the Temporary Foreign Worker Program .

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
